title: What is Employee Advocacy and How Do Marketers Succeed At It?
author: LinkedIn Marketing Solutions
notes: Useful for definition and program principles. Older source, so do not use for current feature availability.

title: My Company tab and Employee Advocacy tab is no longer available
author: LinkedIn
notes: Supports current feature-status claims about discontinued advocacy surfaces and remaining admin actions.

title: Use Employee Notifications on LinkedIn Pages
author: LinkedIn
notes: Supports mechanics and limits for Employee Notifications.

title: LinkedIn Pages Best Practices
author: LinkedIn
notes: Supports weekly practical recommendation for notifying employees of important Page posts.

title: Post analytics for your content
author: LinkedIn
notes: Supports available individual post analytics and estimate caveat.

title: How B2B Marketers Can Use Thought Leadership to Persuade Hidden Buyers
author: LinkedIn Marketing Solutions and Edelman
notes: Use for B2B buying-context rationale only. Do not turn into an employee advocacy performance claim.

title: How to Grow Your AI Search Visibility With LinkedIn Content
author: Margarita Loktionova
notes: Use for operating advice around customer pain points, sales inputs, and hands-on employees. Avoid uncited Semrush statistics unless citing original study separately.

title: What Is Employee-Generated Content?
author: Jeffery Schroeder
notes: Use only for internal linking and category context.

title: Employee-Generated Content vs Employee Advocacy
author: Jeffery Schroeder
notes: Use for internal linking to the broader comparison.

title: LinkedIn Content Infrastructure For B2B Sales Teams
author: Jeffery Schroeder
notes: Use for internal linking to the broader LinkedIn-led GTM operating model.
